home.hero_title: Plan Your New Life in New Zealand
home.hero_subtitle: The complete settlement planner for Bangladeshi students — budgets, cities, and step-by-step guidance in BDT and NZD.
home.hero_simple_title: Plan the move before the stress takes over.
home.hero_simple_subtitle: A simple planning space for Bangladeshi students moving to New Zealand. Choose a city, see realistic costs, and understand what life may actually feel like.
home.step1_title: Pick a city that fits you
home.step1_desc: Start with the place, because rent, lifestyle, and job reality change city by city.
home.step2_desc: Understand monthly costs, move-in cash, and how far your current savings really go.
home.step3_desc: Use the planner, job info, and essentials guide to turn uncertainty into a plan.
home.flag_badge: Helping Bangladeshis settle in New Zealand
home.visual_alt_nature: Queenstown landscape with mountains and open sky
home.hero_card_title: See the destination, then make the numbers make sense.
home.hero_card_body: This demo is designed to help students start quickly without getting buried in forms, clutter, or consultancy-style pressure.
home.cta_banner_title: You only need one city and one honest budget to begin.
home.cta_banner_subtitle: The goal is not to have everything figured out today. The goal is to make the move feel clearer than it did five minutes ago.

planner.lifestyle_subprompt: Pick your situation — we'll load the right cost template automatically.
planner.city_prompt: Which city are you moving to?
planner.city_subprompt: Select a city to see suburb-level cost estimates.
planner.day1_subtitle: Liquid cash needed before you can move in
planner.fund_disclaimer: Enter your savings for accommodation and living costs only. Do not include tuition fees or money reserved for other purposes.
planner.enter_fund_prompt: Enter your living fund above to see your survival window

dashboard.hero_title_guest: Preview how your planning dashboard can feel.
dashboard.hero_subtitle_guest: Even in demo mode, this should feel calm and useful: your likely costs, your best next step, and the plan that deserves attention first.
dashboard.hero_subtitle_auth: Your dashboard should help you decide what to improve next, not just show a pile of numbers.
dashboard.primary_cta_guest: Sign in to save this feeling
dashboard.next_step_title: Tighten your monthly budget before you optimize anything else.
dashboard.next_step_body: Users usually feel more confident once rent, groceries, and move-in cash are clear. Everything else becomes easier after that.
dashboard.readiness_title: How ready does this plan feel?
dashboard.readiness_summary: A readiness score is only useful when it gives direction. This version is intentionally more editorial: clear signal, less dashboard noise.
dashboard.insight_body: If you can increase your monthly contribution a little or choose a slightly cheaper city, your readiness improves faster than cutting minor lifestyle costs.
dashboard.timeline_subtitle: The first weeks feel less chaotic when the order of tasks is visible.

guide.title: NZ Essentials for BD Students
guide.subtitle: Everything you need to know before and after you land — written for Bangladeshis.

auth.why_1: Save your budget plan and return later without rebuilding everything.
auth.why_2: Keep your currency, language, and profile context in one place.
auth.why_3: Unlock your personal dashboard and future checklist progress.
auth.signin_title: Sign in to save your planning progress
auth.signin_subtitle: This is a frontend-only demo for now, so every button and input is intentionally low-friction.
auth.signup_subtitle: Try the full sign-up UX now. No backend is connected yet, so this is a demo flow.
auth.forgot_subtitle: Enter any email and continue. This screen is UX-only for now.
auth.reset_subtitle: This step is simulated for the current frontend phase.
auth.profile_subtitle: This profile is frontend-only for now, but it helps shape the full account experience.
auth.forgot_success: Demo reset link sent. In the real flow, the user would receive an email here.
auth.reset_note: Any value is accepted in this demo flow.
auth.save_plan_signedout: Sign in first to save this plan to your dashboard.
auth.save_plan_signedin: You are signed in. Your saved plans so far: {{count}}.
auth.plan_snapshot: Current snapshot: NZD {{monthly}} monthly · {{runway}} months runway

tools.checklist_desc: Keep track of the must-do items before you fly.
tools.compare_desc: View rent, transport, groceries, and student suburb signals side by side.
tools.jobs_desc: See common student work types, hourly rates, and an earnings calculator.
tools.essentials_desc: Banking, IRD, shopping, health, and community basics in one place.
tools.converter_desc: Convert BDT to NZD and understand what the amount really means.
